# Fabric Physics Prompt Engine (2026)

**Description:**
The Fabric Physics Prompt Engine (2026) is a modular realism framework for AI image generation and image editing that transforms clothing from a flat texture approximation into a simulated physical system. Its purpose is to force generative models to treat garments as objects governed by fabric mechanics, gravity, tension, compression, seam constraints, material stiffness, and anatomical interaction.

The workflow is designed primarily for photoreal and stylized-realism pipelines involving fashion imagery, character redesigns, anatomy reshaping, cinematic portraits, and corrective inpainting. It specifically addresses one of the most persistent weaknesses in modern generative models: unrealistic “painted-on” clothing that fails to respond naturally to body shape, movement, or physical forces.

## Purpose

The Fabric Physics Prompt Engine is a modular prompting framework designed to improve clothing realism in AI-generated and AI-edited imagery. The framework forces the model to simulate believable fabric behavior through:
- Gravity
- Tension
- Compression
- Material stiffness
- Weight distribution
- Seam behavior
- Fold hierarchy
- Anatomical interaction
- Layered garment structure

It is optimized for:
- Body reshaping
- Fashion photography prompts
- Character redesigns
- Stylized realism
- High-detail portrait generation
- Clothing correction after anatomy edits
- Preventing painted-on clothing artifacts
- AI inpainting and image editing workflows
